violations.text: The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom of the 2 door reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
